A

AnimationFrames - Class in AnimationStates
Represents a sequence of animation frames used by an AnimationPlayer.
AnimationFrames(Image[]) - Constructor for class AnimationStates.AnimationFrames
create a new AnimationFrames container.
AnimationPlayer - Class in AnimationStates
Handles playnig an animatin - framing timing, looping and keeps track of which frame we are on
AnimationPlayer(AnimationFrames, long) - Constructor for class AnimationStates.AnimationPlayer
Creates a new animation player.
AnimationState - Interface in AnimationStates
Represents a single animation "state" the pet can be in.
AnimationStateMachine - Class in AnimationStates
Handles which animation state the pet is currently in.
AnimationStateMachine(AnimationState) - Constructor for class AnimationStates.AnimationStateMachine
 
AnimationStates - package AnimationStates

AnimationTestWindow() - Constructor for class AnimationStates.AnimationTestWindow
 
animStates - Class in AnimationStates
Holds all the different animation states the pet can switch between.
animStates() - Constructor for class AnimationStates.animStates
Loads all animation sequences and sets up the state machine.

I

idling() - Method in class project.desktoppet302.PetController
Handles the actions of the pet when it is not being interacted with by the user.
init() - Static method in class project.Trivia.dao.DatabaseInitialiser
Initializes the database by creating all required tables and seeding questions from QuestionsSeeder.
initialize() - Method in class project.desktoppet302.PetController
Handles initialisation actions for variables walkPet, desktopPet, then, breakTimer, and idlePet.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class project.pomodoro.controller.PomodoroController
Initializes the editable TableView FXML TableView is populated by user's recorded Session data stored in the SQLite database Allows Users to directly update Session Data by selecting and editing cells Read and Update CRUD operations are handled here.
insert(Session) - Method in class project.pomodoro.model.SessionDAO
CRUD Operation - Create Operation Insert a new Session to the database, assigning the new Session fields

isShock() - Method in class AnimationStates.animStates

Q

Question - Class in project.Trivia
Represents a trivia question with four multiple-choice options and the correct answer.
